Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Continued To Aug-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Karen L. Caldwell for Shawn Ellis and Sandra Dillard (Co-Trustees).

The Court expressed concern with regard to Cherese Logan. Ms. Caldwell stated that she had spoken with Ms. Logan (now Ms. Heckard) on many occasions, that Mr. Ellis had also spoken to Ms. Heckard, that she had informed Ms. Heckard that she had the right to seek full damages, and suggested that Ms. Heckard obtain an attorney. Ms. Caldwell further stated that Ms. Heckard had taken about two months to think about her options and that the end result had been that Ms. Heckard had to chosen to forgive Ms. Dillard in some way. Ms. Caldwell presented a brief update. The Court stated that it would need to see a receipt for the $26,500.00 surcharge amount that Sandra deposited into the Estate account. The Court stated that it would also like for Ms. Heckard to appear in court or consult an attorney and file a declaration that indicates that she has full knowledge of the amount that she is due and that she understands what she is giving up. In addition, the Court stated that it would like to know Ms. Heckard's position with regard to Sandra receiving her full share. The matter was continued to August 19, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the receipt $26,5000.00 surcharge funds deposited into the Estate account and for an appearance by Ms. Heckard and/or her Counsel. If Ms. Heckard does not wish to appear then the Court will be looking for a declaration from her stating that she has consulted an attorney and that she is fully aware of the consequences and the loss that she'll be taking.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Harris. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Final Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution Or Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Continued To May-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Karen Caldwell for Sandra Dillard and Shawn Ellis.

Ms. Caldwell stated that the inventory was completed, that appraisals were done, that they were somewhere in her Clients house, that she spoke to Mr. Lee (Probate Referee) and that they decided to do a new inventory. In addition, Ms. Caldwell stated that both homes are now in foreclosure, that the rents collected were not deposited into the Estate account, that Ms. Dillard promised to resign, and that she notified the Bank to stop direct deposits to Ms. Dillard's account. Furthermore, Ms. Caldwell stated that one house is underwater, that the other has some equity, that the mortgage arears are at about $50,000.00 and that Mr. Ellis understands that he needs to take action. Ms. Dillard's powers are immediately suspended. Amended letters are to be issued. Sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day are imposed and begin to run as of today against both of the Co-Administrators and are subject to review on May 2, 2012. The Order to Appear was taken off calendar. Status of the Inventory and Appraisal and the Petition for Final Distribution was continued to May 2, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Caldwell will prepare an order reflecting the above.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

If the Inventory and Appraisal is not filed by the sixth day, sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day will begin to run against Attorney Karen Caldwell and the Administrator Sandra Dillard. Status of filing of the Inventory and Appraisal, etc. was continued to March 21, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

March 8, 2012 - Upon further review, An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrators and the Attorney to appear on March 21, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Inventory and Appraisal has not been filed and why sanctions in the amount of $25.00 per day should not be imposed.
